programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: (PG) Will Tanya and Vito's game-changing living and dining room pay off and wow Neale, Shaynna and Darren?

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: Couples compete to renovate properties under strict deadlines and budgets in a high-stakes reality contest. They design, build, and style spaces while facing challenges, judging, and intense competition each week. Their finished homes are auctioned, with profits determining the winners in a dramatic finale.

programme.title: The Block: Episode
programme.desc: Couples compete to renovate properties under strict deadlines and budgets in a high-stakes reality contest. They design, build, and style spaces while facing challenges, judging, and intense competition each week. Their finished homes are auctioned, with profits determining the winners in a dramatic finale.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: (PG) The Blockheads are halfway through hell week and to add to the workload they have their pools to excavate.

programme.title: The Block

They design, build, and style spaces while facing challenges, judging, and intense competition each week. Their finished homes are auctioned, with profits determining the winners in a dramatic finale.
